title: Xtra Rich Thai Napa Cabbage Yum Salad
description: A rich and pillowy Thai dish featuring napa cabbage, infused oil, and vegetarian-friendly ingredients, perfect for a show-off yum salad. This salad is a flavorful and refreshing twist on traditional Thai cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded napa cabbage, thinly sliced red onion, chopped mint leaves, and chopped cilantro leaves.
In a small bowl, whisk together the infused oil, lime juice, palm sugar, salt, and pepper to make the dressing.
Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss to combine.
Let the salad sit at room temperature for 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, toss the salad again to redistribute the dressing.
Transfer the salad to a serving platter or individual plates.
Garnish with additional mint leaves and cilantro leaves, if desired.
